songs.title: 2 hands
feed: “2 hands” by Tate McRae reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“2 hands” by Tate McRae reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 2 spots to #1.
“2 hands” by Tate McRae is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 51 streams units.
“2 hands” by Tate McRae is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 27 airplay units.

songs.title: You Suck at Love
feed: “You Suck at Love” by Simple Plan debuts at #3 in Personal Hot 100.
“You Suck at Love” by Simple Plan is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 27 sales units.
“You Suck at Love” by Simple Plan is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 323,204 total units.

songs.title: Down
feed: “Down” by blink-182 reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 30 spots to #9.
“Down” by blink-182 climbs inside the top 10 of Personal Hot 100, rising 30 spots to #9.
“Down” by blink-182 is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 231% to 245 points.
